headline: Never SALT again.
subline: JotPsych can't write a Same-As-Last-Time note. The structure prevents it.
primary_text: Same-As-Last-Time notes get audited. JotPsych can't write one. By design.

headline: Civil Monetary Penalties.
subline: Cloned BH documentation. Merit Health, MS. 2019. Medicare.
primary_text: $2.02M Civil Monetary Penalties recoupment for cloned BH documentation. OIG settlement, 2019. Real.
attribution: Source: OIG civil settlement, 2019 · Merit Health Medical Group

headline: Same patient. Same dog. Same note.
subline: Every week, identical. Until JotPsych writes the second one.
primary_text: Same patient. Same dog. The SALT note copies forward week after week. JotPsych can't. By design.

headline: One keystroke. One audit.
subline: Cloned notes are the most preventable cause of BH audit recoupments. JotPsych can't write one.
primary_text: Same-As-Last-Time notes are the most preventable cause of behavioral-health audit recoupments. By design.

headline: notes behind.
subline: After the clawback. After the new template. After the audit.
primary_text: Our psychiatry dept was audited. The clawback was hundreds of thousands of dollars. I'm 68 notes behind.

headline: If you run a 30+ provider BH group:
subline: SALT is what your providers do at 7pm when they're trying to leave.
primary_text: If you run a 30+ provider BH group, SALT is what your providers do at 7pm when they're trying to leave.

headline: 5 audit triggers BH admins miss.
subline: Cloned notes. Identical risk scores. Repeated CPT codes. Templated assessments. Copy-forward Dx.
primary_text: 5 audit triggers most BH admins miss. The first one is what your EHR's copy-forward button creates.
attribution: Source: OIG audit findings, public BH enforcement record

headline: Copy-forward vs By design.
subline: Legacy EHRs ship a copy-forward button. JotPsych ships a structural answer.
primary_text: Legacy EHRs ship a copy-forward button. JotPsych ships a structural answer to it. By design.
